Frequently Asked Questions

How long does delivery take?

We deliver within 24 hours in Kerala. Other areas take 2-3 business days.

Do you offer catering for events?

Yes! We offer bulk orders and custom arrangements for weddings, parties, and corporate events.

Is kunafa suitable for vegetarians?

Absolutely! Our kunafa uses vegetarian-friendly cheese and all-natural ingredients.
